---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to benchmark rigor, docs, or developer workflow
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Describe the feature request.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What limitation does it address?

## Proposed Approach

Describe your preferred implementation at a high level.

## Alternatives Considered

List alternatives and why they are less suitable.

## Success Criteria

How will we know this is complete and useful?

## Additional Context

Add links, references, or supporting examples.
